_comment: OSCAR example: a machine-readable catalog of key EEGLAB functions, the bolt-on the library archetype recommends for MATLAB toolboxes (which have no package registry or docstring standard). Generate this from the functions' 'help' blocks so it does not drift, and serve it from eeglab.org. This is a representative subset, not the full API.
dataStructure: EEG (the EEGLAB structure); datasets are stored as .set (metadata) plus .fdt (data)

functions.name: pop_loadset
functions.summary: Load an EEGLAB dataset from a .set file.

functions.name: pop_eegfiltnew
functions.summary: Apply a finite impulse response (FIR) high-pass, low-pass, or band-pass filter.

functions.name: pop_runica
functions.summary: Run independent component analysis (ICA) to separate sources.

functions.name: pop_epoch
functions.summary: Extract epochs time-locked to events of the given types.

functions.name: eeg_checkset
functions.summary: Validate and repair the consistency of an EEG structure.

functions.name: pop_saveset
functions.summary: Save a dataset to a .set file.
